data.title: ETH aims for $3,200-$3,400 rebound in Feb despite bearish trend. Trading at $2,886; analyst predicts 16% rise to $3,376. Key resistance at $3,024.
data.description: The current trading price of Ethereum is $2,886, indicating a bearish MACD trend, yet analysts predict a potential 16% increase to $3,376 by February. For a bullish trend to continue, Ethereum needs to surpass the critical resistance level of $3,024.

data.title: XRP struggles below $2, down 4% in a week, with $1.90 price & $116.05B market cap. Bitcoin drops 5.5%, Ethereum falls 9.8%.
data.description: The cryptocurrency XRP is currently trading at $1.90, with a market cap of $116.05 billion. Over the past week, XRP has experienced a 3.3% decrease in value, falling below the key psychological $2 level. Open interest in XRP has also dropped to its lowest level since December 2025. In comparison, Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) is trading at $87,916.61 with a market cap of $1.75 trillion, reflecting a 5.5% decrease, while Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) is at $2,904.42 with a market cap of $350.6 billion, down by 9.8%. Crypto analyst Tony believes that XRP is at a critical juncture and if it reclaims $1.89, it could indicate strength and lead to higher targets. On the other hand, Cryptoinsightuk notes that despite revisiting a previous breakdown level, XRP remains within a major support zone structurally. The situation suggests a bearish outlook on the surface, but the fundamental support remains unchanged. For further details, the full story is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Investors await Tesla Q4 earnings call despite news of safety monitor-free robotaxis. Stock in new base. Musk under spotlight.
data.description: Tesla is currently forming a new base as it prepares to release its fourth-quarter earnings later this week. Investors are closely watching CEO Elon Musk and the upcoming conference call. Musk recently mentioned the availability of safety monitor-free robotaxis, however, the main focus remains on the Q4 financial results. The company's stock performance and Musk's announcements are generating significant attention ahead of the earnings call.

data.title: CoreWeave stock surged as Nvidia invests $2 billion in the cloud services provider during data center expansion.
data.description: CoreWeave saw a surge in its stock value following an announcement by AI chip manufacturer Nvidia about injecting an additional $2 billion into the cloud computing services company. This investment comes as Nvidia continues to expand its data center infrastructure.

data.title: Gold prices surge above $5,000 per ounce, boosting gold ETFs and miner stocks.
data.description: The price of gold surged to over $5,000 per ounce at the beginning of the week, causing a notable rise in various gold exchange-traded funds (ETFs) and stocks of gold mining companies. This development marks a significant milestone in the gold market, with the news further boosting investor enthusiasm. The upward trend in gold prices has also led to a substantial increase in trading activity within the ETFs and gold miner stocks, reflecting a growing interest in gold as a safe-haven investment.

data.title: IonQ is acquiring SkyWater for $1.8 billion in cash and stock, a significant move in quantum computing stocks.
data.description: IonQ, known for its active acquisition strategy in the quantum computing industry, has reached an agreement to acquire SkyWater for a substantial $1.8 billion in a combination of cash and stock. This acquisition marks a significant move in the Quantum Computing Stocks sector, reflecting IonQ's ambitious growth plans.

data.title: BNB price target set at $950-$1,050 by Feb 2026. Short-term goal $893, breakout level $893.14, support at $845.14.
data.description: Summary of BNB Price Predictions: In the short term (1 week), the target price is $893. For the medium term (1 month), the forecast ranges between $950 and $1,050. The bullish breakout level is set at $893.14, with critical support at $845.14.

data.title: HSK listed on Kraken at 1pm UTC on Jan 26, featuring HSK/USD and HSK/EUR trading pairs. Kraken is a top crypto platform.
data.description: On January 26, 2026, the HashKey Platform Token (HSK) was officially listed on Kraken at 1pm UTC. Kraken, a prominent crypto asset platform, introduced the HSK/USD and HSK/EUR spot trading pairs. The listing on Kraken, a long-standing player in the crypto industry, marks a significant development for HSK with global exposure.

data.title: Automotive retail performance in 2026 will be defined by precision in inventory and pricing. Supply, demand, and pricing alignment in real time are crucial. Leaders will adapt to elevated prices and payment-sensitive shoppers.
data.description: In the city of Grand Rapids, Michigan, it is noted that as prices continue to stay high and consumers become increasingly conscious of their spending, successful leaders will be the ones who can effectively synchronize supply, demand, and pricing immediately. This information was announced on January 26, 2026, through a press release. The automotive retail sector in 2026 is expected to heavily depend on making accurate and timely choices regarding these crucial elements.

data.title: FDA clears da Vinci 5 for cardiac procedures, expanding indications with 510(k) clearance.
data.description: FDA recently granted 510(k) clearance to expand the indications for the da Vinci surgical system to include certain cardiac procedures. This regulatory approval allows the da Vinci system to be used for a broader range of surgeries related to the heart. The clearance is significant as it broadens the scope of the da Vinci system's applications and highlights its safety and efficacy in cardiac procedures. This update opens up new opportunities in the field of minimally invasive surgery, potentially benefiting a larger number of patients. The expansion of indications underscores the system's versatility and the growing acceptance of robotic-assisted surgery in the medical community.

data.title: CobbleStone Software unveils Contract Insight 22.6.0 with real-time collaboration and AI upgrades. Smoother contract management experience.
data.description: CobbleStone Software has introduced innovative real-time collaboration features and AI-enhanced document editing capabilities in the latest version of CobbleStone Contract Insight® 22.6.0. The update is aimed at providing users with a more seamless and intelligent contract management experience. The company is based in Princeton, N.J. The release was made available on January 26, 2026.

data.title: SEALSQ showcases WISeRobot at Davos Event, emphasizing Post-Quantum Secure Physical AI, Post-Quantum Cryptography.
data.description: SEALSQ Corp (NASDAQ: LAES), a prominent player in semiconductors, PKI, and post-quantum cryptography solutions, unveiled its Post-Quantum Cryptography Robotic Concept at the Physical AI Roundtable in Davos during the World Economic Forum Annual Meeting. The demonstration showcased WISeRobot, a collaboration with parent company WISeKey International Holding Ltd (SIX: WIHN, NASDAQ: WKEY), known for cybersecurity, blockchain, and IoT services. The event highlighted the importance of integrating post-quantum security into physical AI and robotic systems.

data.title: A2Gold starts 30,000m drill program at Eastside project to test mineralization continuity. TSXV: AUAU, OTCQX: AUXXF, FRA: RR7.
data.description: A2Gold Corp. is set to begin drilling in Tonopah, Nevada, testing various high-priority targets. The drilling will focus on assessing the continuity of mineralization between the McIntosh and Castle deposits. This initiative is part of the company's strategic plan to explore new opportunities and maximize mineral resources. A2Gold Corp., listed on the TSXV as AUAU, the OTCQX as AUXXF, and the FRA as RR7, is eager to commence this exploration project in the pursuit of further growth and success.

data.title: American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings, Inc. rebranded as Dauch Corporation, trading under ticker symbol "DCH" on NYSE.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, American Axle & Manufacturing Holdings, Inc. revealed a significant change by officially renaming itself Dauch Corporation through an amendment made to its Certificate of Incorporation. The Detroit-based company embraced the new identity to operate under the name Dauch Corporation moving forward. This alteration marks a strategic shift for the firm as it redefines its branding in the market.

data.title: Kingston's IronKey Keypad 200 Series USB flash drives achieve NIST FIPS 140-3 Level 3 certification, matching the IronKey D500S.
data.description: In Fountain Valley, California, Kingston Digital, Inc., a Flash memory subsidiary of Kingston Technology Company, Inc., a prominent player in memory products and technology solutions, revealed that their highly regarded Kingston IronKey Keypad 200 series USB flash drives (KP200 and KP200C) have been granted NIST FIPS 140-3 Level 3 validation. This recognition aligns the KP200 series with the IronKey D500S, which had previously attained this top-tier security standard.

data.title: LTC acquires $108 million SHOP portfolio in Atlanta, with 400 units at 92% occupancy.
data.description: In Westlake Village, California, LTC Properties, Inc. (NYSE: LTC) revealed its acquisition of a Senior Housing Operating Portfolio (SHOP) totaling $108 million. The deal encompasses a three-property portfolio located in Atlanta, Georgia. This acquisition includes close to 400 units for independent living, assisted living, and memory care. These properties are currently stabilized at a 92% occupancy rate. The buildings were constructed between 2014 and 2...

data.title: Sabra Health Care REIT discloses 2025 distributions tax treatment: $0.30 per share, $0.24 ordinary dividends.
data.description: Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. (NASDAQ: SBRA) based in Tustin, California, disclosed the tax treatment details for its 2025 distributions. The breakdown for income tax purposes of cash distributions paid on Sabra Health Care REIT, Inc. Common Stock (CUSIP # 78573L106) is as follows: On the record date of 02/14/2025 and payable date of 02/28/2025, a distribution per share of $0.3000000 was made, consisting of $0.2438846 in total ordinary dividends, with $0 in non-qualified dividends, $0 in qualified dividends, and $0 in non-dividend distributions.

data.title: Bitcoin mining in the US slowed due to winter storm, causing miners to reduce electricity consumption, briefly lowering hashrate.
data.description: The severe drop in temperatures caused miners to reduce their electricity consumption, resulting in a temporary decrease in hashrate. This occurred as grid strain was felt across multiple areas.
